summary: Frontend-only testing of /how-i-work page updates: testimonials redesign, hero CTA inline panel, final CTA card transform, nav CTA smart routing. All 6 features tested and passing.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Playwright test for 'click outside to dismiss' final-CTA form requires clicking far left/right of centered card (x<604 or x>1316 in 1920px viewport). The section onClick fires correctly — just not at center since card is centered. Behavior is correct.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features on /how-i-work are working: (1) Testimonials: 0 img tags, 3 text nav buttons (testimonial-nav-0/1/2) confirmed. (2) Hero CTA opens glassmorphic panel (method-contact-form-panel), headline shrinks to 55px. (3) Escape key closes hero panel. (4) Final CTA btn (method-cta-btn) transforms card to show inline form. (5) Click outside card (far left/right of centered card) restores original content. (6) Nav CTA at top -> hero panel; nav CTA mid-page -> contact modal. All PASS.

test_results.TEST_1_testimonials_no_portrait_images: PASS - 0 img tags in testimonials section
test_results.TEST_1_testimonial_nav_buttons: PASS - testimonial-nav-0, nav-1, nav-2 all present with author+company text
test_results.TEST_2_headline_font_shrinks: PASS - font-size is 55px when panel open
test_results.TEST_3_escape_closes_panel: PASS - panel not visible after Escape key
test_results.TEST_4_final_cta_card_transform: PASS - form inputs appear inside method-final-cta-card after click
test_results.TEST_5_click_outside_restores: PASS - clicking outside card (x=50) restores original content
test_results.TEST_6_nav_cta_hero_visible: PASS - nav CTA at hero opens hero panel (not modal)
test_results.TEST_6b_nav_cta_mid_page: PASS - nav CTA mid-page opens contact modal (not hero panel)
